description: Style Note Give your wardrobe a fashionable edge with these lounge pants from jockey. The soft fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Team them with a stylish tee and sports shoes for a look that's effortlessly comfortable. Product DetailsAssorted lounge pants that have an elasticated waistband with a drawstring for a customised Fit, rubber print on the left thigh and is designed to be worn as lounge wear, leisure wear and active wear Material and Care Cotton/elastane Machine wash delicate inside out at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations
